'''âzh-s-f''' ('''kazhasaf''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:preacquaint|preacquaint]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-s-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:preacquaint|preacquaint]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âzh-s-f
|-
! Lemma
| kazhasaf
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizhasaf|thizhasaf]] || [[word:jizhasaf|jizhasaf]] || [[word:shizhasaf|shizhasaf]] || [[word:kizhasaf|kizhasaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzhasaf|thuthuzhasaf]] || [[word:jujuzhasaf|jujuzhasaf]] || [[word:shushuzhasaf|shushuzhasaf]] || [[word:kukuzhasaf|kukuzhasaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzhasaf|thuzhasaf]] || [[word:juzhasaf|juzhasaf]] || [[word:shuzhasaf|shuzhasaf]] || [[word:kuzhasaf|kuzhasaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzhasaf|thuzhasaf]] || [[word:juzhasaf|juzhasaf]] || [[word:shuzhasaf|shuzhasaf]] || [[word:kuzhasaf|kuzhasaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezhasaf|thezhasaf]] || [[word:jezhasaf|jezhasaf]] || [[word:shezhasaf|shezhasaf]] || [[word:kezhasaf|kezhasaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozhasaf|thothozhasaf]] || [[word:jojozhasaf|jojozhasaf]] || [[word:shoshozhasaf|shoshozhasaf]] || [[word:kokozhasaf|kokozhasaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozhasaf|thozhasaf]] || [[word:jozhasaf|jozhasaf]] || [[word:shozhasaf|shozhasaf]] || [[word:kozhasaf|kozhasaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozhasaf|thozhasaf]] || [[word:jozhasaf|jozhasaf]] || [[word:shozhasaf|shozhasaf]] || [[word:kozhasaf|kozhasaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzhasaf|thĂŠzhasaf]] || [[word:jĂŠzhasaf|jĂŠzhasaf]] || [[word:shĂŠzhasaf|shĂŠzhasaf]] || [[word:kĂŠzhasaf|kĂŠzhasaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazhasaf|thathazhasaf]] || [[word:jajazhasaf|jajazhasaf]] || [[word:shashazhasaf|shashazhasaf]] || [[word:kakazhasaf|kakazhasaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazhasaf|thazhasaf]] || [[word:jazhasaf|jazhasaf]] || [[word:shazhasaf|shazhasaf]] || [[word:kazhasaf|kazhasaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazhasaf|thazhasaf]] || [[word:jazhasaf|jazhasaf]] || [[word:shazhasaf|shazhasaf]] || [[word:kazhasaf|kazhasaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazhasaf|shazhasaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazhasaf|goshazhasaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazhasaf|gokishazhasaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazhasafnĂŒ|shazhasafnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazhasafnknĂŒ|goshazhasafnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhasafnĂŒ|gokishazhasafnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazhasafshĂ«|shazhasafshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazhasafnkshĂ«|goshazhasafnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazhasafshĂ«|gokishazhasafshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhasafro|shazhasafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhasafnkro|goshazhasafnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhasafro|gokishazhasafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhasafmu|shazhasafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhasafnkmu|goshazhasafnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhasafmu|gokishazhasafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazhasafsher|shazhasafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazhasafnksher|goshazhasafnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazhasafsher|gokishazhasafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazhasafng|shazhasafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazhasafnkng|goshazhasafnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazhasafng|gokishazhasafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazhasafya|shazhasafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazhasafnkya|goshazhasafnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazhasafya|gokishazhasafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazhasafyam|shazhasafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazhasafnkyam|goshazhasafnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazhasafyam|gokishazhasafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhasafnĂŒshĂ«|shazhasafnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhasafnknĂŒshĂ«|goshazhasafnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhasafnĂŒshĂ«|gokishazhasafnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhasafnĂŒro|shazhasafnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhasafnknĂŒro|goshazhasafnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhasafnĂŒro|gokishazhasafnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhasafnĂŒmu|shazhasafnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhasafnknĂŒmu|goshazhasafnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhasafnĂŒmu|gokishazhasafnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhasafshĂ«nĂŒ|shazhasafshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhasafnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshazhasafnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhasafshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishazhasafshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhasafshĂ«ro|shazhasafshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhasafnkshĂ«ro|goshazhasafnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhasafshĂ«ro|gokishazhasafshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhasafshĂ«mu|shazhasafshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhasafnkshĂ«mu|goshazhasafnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhasafshĂ«mu|gokishazhasafshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhasafronĂŒ|shazhasafronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhasafnkronĂŒ|goshazhasafnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhasafronĂŒ|gokishazhasafronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhasafroshĂ«|shazhasafroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhasafnkroshĂ«|goshazhasafnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhasafroshĂ«|gokishazhasafroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhasafromu|shazhasafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhasafnkromu|goshazhasafnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhasafromu|gokishazhasafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhasafmunĂŒ|shazhasafmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhasafnkmunĂŒ|goshazhasafnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhasafmunĂŒ|gokishazhasafmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhasafmushĂ«|shazhasafmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhasafnkmushĂ«|goshazhasafnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhasafmushĂ«|gokishazhasafmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhasafmuro|shazhasafmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhasafnkmuro|goshazhasafnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhasafmuro|gokishazhasafmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
